title: Hint
text: A 4% $$p-value$$ cutoff means that the total probability outside the acceptance region is 4%. If this is the total probability outside the acceptance region, how much is in the right tail?

title: Hint
text: the total probability outside the acceptance region in the right-tail is 2%. Probability outside of 98% is not accepted.

text: Go to the python reference sheet to determine which methods or functions to use.
